message:
chore(beads): refine alien epic dependencies — fix 4 false deps, add labels

- Remove false dep I.1→A.1 (atomic pending flag is independent of S3-FIFO)
- Remove false dep G.2→G.1 (conformal prediction is independent of BOCPD)
- Remove false dep B.2→D.1 (ledger wiring doesn't need posterior computation)
- Add dep D.3→G.2 (conformal coverage test needs the predictor)
- Add tui label to B.1 (evidence ledger is cross-cutting)
- Fix E.1 title (uses DefaultHasher/SipHash, not FNV)
- Ready tasks: 11 (up from 9), blocked: 23, cycles: 0
